title: GoalData
description: Represents all the details pertaining to a goal.

goalCompletionLocation.description: URL of the page where this goal was completed.

goalCompletions.description: Total number of goal completions in this activity.

goalIndex.description: This identifies the goal as configured for the profile.

goalPreviousStep1.description: URL of the page one step prior to the goal completion.

goalPreviousStep2.description: URL of the page two steps prior to the goal completion.

goalPreviousStep3.description: URL of the page three steps prior to the goal completion.
